{{Infobox artifact
| name = Midnight
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The new weapon is named [[Midnight]], Cursed [[Spear]] of the [[Destroyer]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Midnight]] is a spear used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses the weapon [[Midnight]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
